description_long: This modern house features a sleek, rectilinear design with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior finishes. The property includes a spacious driveway, a garage, and a large stone-paved front yard lined with coniferous shrubs. At the rear, there is an expansive patio area with outdoor seating and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by manicured lawns and palm trees. The house has large, horizontally oriented windows that provide ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoor spaces. The landscaping is minimalist, with a few strategically placed trees and hedges for privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor living areas and a clean, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with black and white finishes, large windows, a garage, and a spacious patio with a swimming pool. Minimalist landscaping and open outdoor areas define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, stone-paved yard, and a row of coniferous shrubs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the patio, swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, patio, and the main living area with large windows and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the pool, patio, and the house's flat roof and geometric layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat approach with a modern door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
